_source: AI-analyzed tourism metrics — composite scores from TripAdvisor, UNESCO, Blue Flag, TasteAtlas, safety indices, and travel guides
_note: Each value is a 0–100 composite score. null = data unavailable or concept inapplicable (e.g. beach for landlocked).

_metrics.nightlifeEntertainment: Bars, clubs, live music, festivals, cultural events quality
_metrics.touristScamSafety: Safety from tourist scams, overcharging, fraud (higher = safer)
_metrics.streetFoodCuisine: Quality & variety of street food, food markets, local cuisine reputation
_metrics.beachWaterQuality: Beach quality, water clarity, Blue Flag status. null for landlocked countries
_metrics.walkabilityScenicBeauty: Pedestrian-friendly cities, scenic old towns, viewpoints, promenades
_metrics.shoppingMarkets: Bazaars, malls, luxury outlets, local crafts, souvenir shopping
_metrics.photographySpots: Iconic landmarks, photogenic landscapes, unique architecture
_metrics.familyFriendliness: Kid-friendly attractions, theme parks, safety, family accommodation
_metrics.adventureSports: Paragliding, bungee, surfing, rafting, zip-lines, trekking, diving
_metrics.historicalSites: Ruins, castles, ancient cities, UNESCO heritage density, archaeological richness
